cover.title: Join the small talk (5 lines)
cover.sub: Open it, keep it going, and leave without the awkward exit.

phrases.nl: Hoi! Wat een leuk feest, hè?
phrases.en: Hi! What a nice party, right?
phrases.when: Break the ice with whoever is standing next to you.

phrases.en: How do you know the birthday person?
phrases.when: The easiest question to ask anyone at a Dutch birthday.

phrases.nl: Woon jij hier in de buurt?
phrases.when: Simple small talk that keeps the chat going.

phrases.nl: Wat leuk! En wat doe jij?
phrases.en: Nice! And what do you do?
phrases.when: Show interest, then turn the question back to them.

phrases.nl: Leuk je te spreken! Tot straks.
phrases.en: Nice talking to you! See you later.
phrases.when: A warm way to leave a chat without the awkward shuffle.

cta.title: Save this before the next party.
cta.sub: Send it to whoever always ends up by the snack table.
